A.description: deterministic from source file lines, exact match required

B.description: joined or derived edges, two percent relative tolerance capped at one thousand records

C.description: network procurement, five percent relative tolerance to absorb upstream shift between fetches

MACULA-Hebrew.tier_rationale: Single XML enumeration from the Clear team. The total morpheme count is an exact element count taken straight from the upstream file as recorded in the inventory catalog, with no joining or sampling involved.

MACULA-Greek-Nestle1904.tier_rationale: Single XML word stream from MACULA against Nestle 1904. Word count is a deterministic element count from the upstream file, identical across reruns because the corpus is frozen and shipped as a versioned release.

MACULA-Greek-SBLGNT.tier_rationale: MACULA enrichment over SBLGNT shipped as one XML stream. Word count is an exact element count from the upstream file. SBLGNT edition is versioned and reproducible byte-for-byte across reruns.

MorphGNT-SBLGNT.tier_rationale: MorphGNT-SBLGNT ships one whitespace token per word across versioned book files. Total is a deterministic line count over the canonical release, identical across reruns because the upstream is a tagged github release.

OSHB-morphology.tier_rationale: Count is verse-child <w> word slots. The prior 306785 was a naive count(.//w) that included 1278 qere <w> nested in <note> blocks, which are materialized as Reading nodes not Words; see docs/PHASE_D_CATALOG_RECONCILIATION.md section 2.

STEPBible-TAHOT.tier_rationale: The count is the de-duplicated populated tagged-Hebrew-word emit. The prior 283734 was the raw upstream ref-row line count; 13 empty-Strong Qere/Ketiv scribal-correction rows are intentionally not projected because their Strong, morph, and surface are materialized via the OSHB x-ketiv Word seam (Decision 16), and a stable-id collapse defect that let an off-canon =X edition overwrite the canonical =L Leningrad word was fixed in commit a277a96 and independently auditor-verified (docs/AUDIT_phase_d_preflight_verification.md). The 283721 figure is byte-deterministic over the frozen upstream and reproducible across runs.

STEPBible-TAGNT.tier_rationale: Deterministic distinct tagged-Greek-word data-row count over the frozen snapshot actually ingested. The prior 141720 was computed from a different release and is not reproducible against these bytes; see docs/PHASE_D_CATALOG_RECONCILIATION.md section 3.

STEPBible-TVTMS.tier_rationale: STEPBible Translators Versification Mapping System ships one row per versification reconciliation rule across two tradition columns. Total is a deterministic line count from the versioned upstream release used at ingest.

STEPBible-TBESH.tier_rationale: STEPBible Brief Extended Strongs Hebrew brief lexicon ships one row per disambiguated Strong-keyed lemma. Total is a deterministic line count from the versioned upstream release used at ingest time.

STEPBible-TBESG.tier_rationale: STEPBible Brief Extended Strongs Greek brief lexicon ships one row per disambiguated Strong-keyed Greek lemma. Total is a deterministic line count from the versioned upstream release used at ingest time.

STEPBible-TFLSJ.tier_rationale: The count is the de-duplicated populated LsjEntry emit. The prior 11034 was the naive raw G/H tab-line count; the faithful adapter drops 1370 rows with empty lemma, transliteration, or pos and collapses 176 duplicate lsj_entry_id stable-id collisions, leaving 9488. Same class as the original 7 reconciliations; the adapter is faithful and is NOT changed. See docs/PHASE_D_TIERA_PREVERIFICATION.md.

STEPBible-morph-codes.tier_rationale: The count is the distinct section-parsed MorphCode emit. The prior 2782 was a naive population; the faithful adapter parses 2677 BRIEF and FULL section codes from TEHMC and TEGMC, then collapses 2 duplicate morph_code_unique codes, leaving 2675. Same class as the original 7 reconciliations; the adapter is faithful and is NOT changed. See docs/PHASE_D_TIERA_PREVERIFICATION.md.

STEPBible-proper-nouns.tier_rationale: Count is the de-duplicated unique person and place occurrence with a resolvable Strong and language. The prior 23205 was a naive tab-line count that included 4262 record-separator banners and alias and meta lines; see docs/PHASE_D_CATALOG_RECONCILIATION.md section 1.

STEPBible-TTESV.tier_rationale: One record per tagged verse line carrying at least one Strong-keyed surface position. The prior 31272 was a naive tab-line count including 53 structural and 92 tag-free ESV-supplied lines; see docs/PHASE_D_CATALOG_RECONCILIATION.md section 4.

OpenBible-cross-refs.tier_rationale: OpenBible.info community cross-reference table ships one row per voted From-Verse to-Verse pair. Total is a deterministic line count from the versioned upstream CSV release used at ingest, no derivation involved.

TSK.tier_rationale: Treasury of Scripture Knowledge ships one row per per-word entry with packed xref_string payload. Row total is a deterministic line count. Edge expansion from xref_string is counted separately in the edge_counts block.

Theographic-Bible-Metadata.tier_rationale: Projected entity nodes (Person plus Place plus Event plus Group plus Tribe plus derived Period). The prior 43690 was the exact 8-file element file-sum which counts books, chapters, verses, and easton that this adapter intentionally does not nodify; see docs/PHASE_D_CATALOG_RECONCILIATION.md section 7.

ETCBC-BHSA.tier_rationale: ETCBC Biblia Hebraica Stuttgartensia Amstelodamensis is shipped via text-fabric as a frozen feature set. Word slot count is deterministic from the otype feature in the versioned text-fabric module used at ingest.

ETCBC-parallels.tier_rationale: The count is the faithful landed Verse-to-Verse PARALLEL_OF edge emit. PARALLEL_OF is Verse-to-Verse: crossref.tf node ids are BHSA verse-otype text-fabric nodes (not BhsaWord word slots), established by FIX-PARALLELS (af75380) which re-keyed the endpoints to the canonical Verse node (verse:<osisRef>, constraint verse_id, Decision 15). The prior 8246 was the raw crossref.tf feature-row count; the binding Decision 3 single-comma split quarantines 2332 multi-target and non-digit-node rows leaving 5914 single-target rows, and the binding (source, target) idempotent MERGE (contract section 6) further collapses 32 exact-duplicate directed verse-pairs, leaving 5882 distinct single-target edges. record_unit stays parallel_edge (endpoint-agnostic). Same idempotent-MERGE-collapse class as the Phase D reconciliation set; the adapter is faithful and is NOT changed (the MERGE idempotency was deliberately not weakened to inflate back to 5914).

ETCBC-phono.tier_rationale: Faithful non-null phono count. Phono is attached at 0.984941 occurrence over the 426590 BHSA word slots; the 6424 null slots are the assimilated-definite-article class (g_word bare maqqef, lex H, sp art) faithfully carrying no phono by upstream design, deterministic and byte-identical over the frozen 2021 text-fabric module. The adapter is faithful per Decision 3 and is NOT changed; this is the Option A re-baseline per docs/PHASE_D_PHONO_EVIDENCE.md.

open-cbgm-3-john.tier_rationale: Count is node-only (Witness plus VariantUnit plus Reading). The prior hand-set 600 with 588 and 612 envelope had no derivation and never modeled the by-design lacuna back-fill; the 700 to 760 envelope absorbs collation revisions. catalog_source_index is null because there is no open-cbgm entry in docs/data_inventory_catalog.json; the previous index 3 mis-pointed at MorphGNT. See docs/PHASE_D_CATALOG_RECONCILIATION.md section 6.

peshitta.tier_rationale: Network procurement against ETCBC peshitta text-fabric module. Upstream byte count is the only signal at procurement time, so the record count is established at first ingest run and locked into a follow-on baseline commit.

vulgate-clementine.tier_rationale: Network procurement against Wikisource Special:Export. Upstream byte count is the only signal at procurement time, so the verse record count is established at first ingest run and locked into a follow-on baseline commit.

coptic-scriptorium.tier_rationale: Network procurement against Coptic SCRIPTORIUM github corpora. Upstream byte count is the only signal at procurement time, so the word record count is established at first ingest run and locked into a follow-on baseline commit.

BRIDGES_LXX.tier_rationale: BRIDGES_LXX is emitted once per distinct (Hebrew Lemma, GreekLemma) pair (deduplicated in macula_hebrew._build via bridge_seen), not per morpheme, per Decision 4. The prior [326475, 382157] band was modeled on a per-morpheme greek/greekstrong occurrence and is stale; band re-based to the faithful distinct-pair emit (live landed 24604) plus or minus two percent. Renamed from GLOSSES_GREEK_LEMMA to the rel-type the committed adapter actually emits. See docs/PHASE_D_EDGECOUNTS_RECONCILE.md Finding 3.

CROSS_REF.tier_rationale: Derived from TSK xref_string parsing and range expansion per Decision 5. Lower bound is the Decision 5 acceptance gate of one hundred thousand. Upper bound assumes an average of eight refs per parsed entry across sixty-three thousand rows. Renamed from HAS_CROSS_REF to the emitted rel-type; band unchanged (live 374549 in-band).

OPENBIBLE_CROSS_REF.tier_rationale: Derived from OpenBible cross-refs as the parallel edge type per Decision 5. Edge count equals row count since one row produces one edge. Two percent capped at one thousand absolute records covers ingest-time row drops. Band HELD at the raw-344799 envelope pending the E1 tvtms-completeness fix and relaunch-5 re-D.4; not reconciled here.

VARIANT_UNIT_NODE.tier_rationale: Derived from open-cbgm 3 John collation per Decision 6, scoped to verses one through fifteen. VariantUnit node count comes from joined database rows in the local SQLite and TEI XML, varying with collation revisions. Renamed from HAS_VARIANT_UNIT to a VariantUnit node-count gate (no HAS_VARIANT_UNIT edge is emitted); band unchanged (live 116 in-band).

ATTESTED_BY.tier_rationale: Derived from open-cbgm 3 John collation per Decision 6. Reading count exceeds VariantUnit count because each unit has multiple attested readings across witnesses, including the lacuna sentinel reading per the edge-case rule. Renamed from HAS_READING to the emitted Reading-to-VariantUnit rel-type; band unchanged (live 470 in-band).

IN_DOMAIN.tier_rationale: Derived from MACULA-Greek Nestle1904 plus SBLGNT words with non-null ln per Decision 2. Min uses raw occurrence sum across both editions. Max adds five percent for polysemy multi-edges where one Strong carries several Louw-Nida senses. Renamed from HAS_LOUW_NIDA_DOMAIN to the emitted Word-to-LouwNidaDomain rel-type; band unchanged (live 260839 in-band).

BHSA_CLAUSE_NODE.tier_rationale: BhsaClause node count per Decision 3; no HAS_CLAUSE edge is emitted (containment is CONTAINS_PHRASE). The prior [71500, 74500] band was a stale clause-otype estimate; band re-based to the faithful clause-otype node count (live BhsaClause 88131) plus or minus two percent. Renamed from HAS_CLAUSE to a BhsaClause node-count gate. See docs/PHASE_D_EDGECOUNTS_RECONCILE.md Finding 3.

CONTAINS_PHRASE.tier_rationale: Derived from ETCBC-BHSA text-fabric phrase slots per Decision 3. Count comes from the phrase otype feature, a join over the clause-to-phrase and phrase-to-word containment edges across the full Hebrew Bible. Renamed from HAS_PHRASE to the emitted containment rel-type; band unchanged (live 253203 in-band).

PARALLEL_OF.tier_rationale: PARALLEL_OF is the faithful Verse-to-Verse landed edge count, equal to the reconciled sources[ETCBC-parallels] 5882 (5914 single-target rows minus 32 idempotent-MERGE-collapsed exact-duplicate directed verse-pairs). The prior [8082, 8411] band still encoded the pre-reconciliation raw 8246 and is stale; band re-based tol-0-aligned to the reconciled tier-A tol-0 source count so the edge gate is internally consistent with the source gate. Renamed from HAS_PARALLEL to the emitted rel-type. See docs/PHASE_D_EDGECOUNTS_RECONCILE.md Finding 2 and Finding 3.

NAMED_AT.tier_rationale: NAMED_AT is the faithful ProperNoun-to-Verse resolution edge per Decision 10. The prior [23205, 27546] band re-counted the already-reconciled sources[STEPBible-proper-nouns] rows plus Theographic projections under a different aggregate and is stale; band re-based to the faithful NAMED_AT emit (live landed 5459) plus or minus two percent. Renamed from IS_PROPER_NOUN to the emitted rel-type. See docs/PHASE_D_EDGECOUNTS_RECONCILE.md Finding 3.
